---
id: get-vrm-position
title: "Get the position of a VRM model"
description: "Retrieve the current position of the specified VRM model in both global viewport (screen) coordinates and world coordinates."
sidebar_label: "Get the position of a VRM model"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the position of a VRM model"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/position"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve the current position of the specified VRM model in both global viewport (screen) coordinates and world coordinates.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
